controls.expected_behavior: reject a generated form missing the first required structural condition
controls.observed_behavior: An omitted source hides a possible predecessor.

controls.expected_behavior: reject a changed official source identity
controls.observed_behavior: the changed identity differs from the registered source manifest

controls.expected_behavior: reject a missing, duplicated or additional survivor
controls.observed_behavior: the generated product contains exactly one registered survivor

controls.expected_behavior: halt any attempt to import an excluded object or answer-producing model
controls.observed_behavior: no stochastic noise cause; no floating error rate or threshold; no assumed metric or nearest-neighbor rule; no unrecorded source inference
